market_summary.notes: KOSPI closed at 5763 points on March 19, down 2.73%. Market volatility remains high due to international oil price spikes (Brent >$107/bbl) and geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. While semiconductor sectors (Samsung, SK Hynix) showed resilience earlier, recent global market weakness and Fed policy concerns dominate current sentiment.
